items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★5 Hyper fixation activation. Amazing gamep
items.summary: Hyper fixation activation. Amazing gameplay and art style, love the story and the voice acting. Would give it six stars but there are only 5. So far my favourite group characters in design are the Aequor peeps, but for game play I lean towards the Ultra faction. Just having an entire turn to command a possibly losing battle and still win is just so appealing and exhilarating.
items.author: Ashton Teoh

items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★5 This game has been an emotional rollerco
items.summary: This game has been an emotional rollercoaster that has genuinely brought me to tears. The storyline is nothing short of breathtaking-it’s rare to find a narrative this moving, with twists that hit hard and characters you’ll fall in love with instantly. I’m not exaggerating when I say I’ve been playing for days straight. It’s that addictive. And the visuals?Dont even get me started, bro. They're absolutely gorgeous. The character designs are stunning, with so much detail and personality.
items.author: strobery
